_comment: LinkedIn GeoID cache for the geoUrn search filter. Names are exactly as LinkedIn's location typeahead renders them — match on the full string. GeoIDs are stable, so each entry is resolved through the filter UI once and reused forever. Added by /linkedin-search-capture on a cache miss.
_resolved: Open /search/results/people/, click the Locations pill, type the name one character at a time, pick the suggestion, click Show results, then read geoUrn out of the URL and dedupe it.
